series_metadata.series_description: Documents investigations and litigation, by the Ohio Attorney General's Office into antitrust matters affecting the State of Ohio. Records include, but are not limited to, research on possible antitrust violations, administrative documentation, pleadings, correspondence, discovery requests (and responses), settlement information, and expert materials.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: Dispose file is closed and all appeals have exhausted (if litigated). ; Paper: Dispose file is closed and all appeals have exhausted (if litigated). If scanned and saved electronically, dispose of paper immediately
